sql_array: CREATE TABLE tab1 (a Map(String, String), b String) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE tab2 (x Int32, y String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT mapContainsKeyLike(a, 'a%') FROM tab1 WHERE b = (SELECT y FROM tab2 WHERE x = 2);
SELECT b, mapContainsKeyLike(a, (x -> concat('b', 'eta'))) FROM tab1 JOIN tab2 ON mapContainsKeyLike(a, concat('g', 'amma')) WHERE x > 1 GROUP BY b HAVING mapContainsKeyLike(a, 'value%') = 1;
SELECT x, mapContainsKeyLike(a, (x -> concat('v', toString(x)))) FROM tab1 CROSS JOIN tab2;
CREATE TABLE tab3 (d Date, m Map(String, Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT d, mapContainsKeyLike(m, (x -> concat('%', toString(x)))) FROM tab3 WHERE d >= toDate('2023-01-01') AND d < toDate('2023-01-03);
SELECT mapContainsKeyLike(m, 'key%') AS contains_key FROM tab3 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tab2 WHERE x < 5);
CREATE TABLE tab4 (id UInt32, info Map(String, String), status Nullable(Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, mapContainsKeyLike(info, (x -> x)) FROM tab4 WHERE status IS NULL OR status = (SELECT status FROM tab4 WHERE id = 2);
